context.projectOverview: agent-bober Phase 4 makes a 'team' a data object. Sprint 1 (DONE) added Team + loadTeam; the programming team's pipelineShape === resolveEngineName(config) by construction. Sprint 2 (DONE) namespaced the memory store. Sprint 3 resolves the pipeline engine from the active team's pipelineShape (reusing selector/eligibility/careful-downgrade), keeping the programming/no-team path byte-for-byte identical to today.

completedSprints.title: Team data model + registry
